dtk.settings.layout_box.heading.context: Settings section heading for layout box mode.

dtk.settings.pollution.heading.context: Settings section heading for pollution overlay settings.

dtk.settings.pollution_toggle.label.context: Settings row label for pollution overlay toggle.

dtk.settings.pollution_toggle.descriptio.en: Enables/disables the in-world pollution rate overlay. Displays averages over the configured days.
dtk.settings.pollution_toggle.descriptio.context: Settings row description for pollution overlay visibility.
dtk.settings.pollution_toggle.descriptio.de: Aktiviert/deaktiviert die Überlagerung der Verschmutzungsrate in der Welt. Zeigt Durchschnittswerte über die konfigurierten Tage an.
dtk.settings.pollution_toggle.descriptio.es: Activa/desactiva la superposición de la tasa de contaminación en el mundo. Muestra promedios durante los días configurados.
dtk.settings.pollution_toggle.descriptio.it: Abilita/disabilita la sovrapposizione del tasso di inquinamento nel mondo. Visualizza le medie nei giorni configurati.
dtk.settings.pollution_toggle.descriptio.pt: Ativa/desativa a sobreposição da taxa de poluição mundial. Exibe as médias dos dias configurados.
dtk.settings.pollution_toggle.descriptio.ru: Включает/отключает наложение уровня загрязнения в мире. Отображает средние значения за настроенные дни.
dtk.settings.pollution_toggle.descriptio.sv: Aktiverar/inaktiverar överlagringen av föroreningshastigheten i världen. Visar medelvärden över de konfigurerade dagarna.
dtk.settings.pollution_toggle.descriptio.zh: 启用/禁用世界内污染率叠加。显示配置天数的平均值。

dtk.settings.pollution_glow.label.context: Settings row label for pollution heatmap glow toggle.
dtk.settings.pollution_glow.label.es: Habilitar el efecto de brillo del mapa de calor
dtk.settings.pollution_glow.label.it: Abilita l'effetto bagliore della mappa termica
dtk.settings.pollution_glow.label.pt: Ativar efeito de brilho do mapa de calor

dtk.settings.pollution_glow.description.en: Cast a glowing light onto polluting entities matching their emission intensity. Disable if causing lag.
dtk.settings.pollution_glow.description.context: Settings row description for pollution heatmap glow.
dtk.settings.pollution_glow.description.de: Werfen Sie ein leuchtendes Licht auf umweltschädliche Einheiten, die ihrer Emissionsintensität entsprechen. Deaktivieren, wenn es zu Verzögerungen kommt.
dtk.settings.pollution_glow.description.es: Proyecte una luz brillante sobre entidades contaminantes que coincida con su intensidad de emisión. Desactívelo si causa retraso.
dtk.settings.pollution_glow.description.it: Proietta una luce brillante sulle entità inquinanti in base alla loro intensità di emissione. Disabilita se causa ritardo.
dtk.settings.pollution_glow.description.pt: Lançar uma luz brilhante sobre entidades poluentes que correspondam à sua intensidade de emissão. Desative se estiver causando atraso.
dtk.settings.pollution_glow.description.ru: Направьте светящийся свет на загрязняющие объекты, соответствующий интенсивности их излучения. Отключите, если вызывает задержку.
dtk.settings.pollution_glow.description.sv: Kasta ett glödande ljus på förorenande enheter som matchar deras utsläppsintensitet. Inaktivera om det orsakar fördröjning.
dtk.settings.pollution_glow.description.zh: 将发光的光投射到与其发射强度相匹配的污染实体上。如果造成延迟，请禁用。

dtk.settings.pollution_days.label.context: Settings row label for the days to average pollution.

dtk.settings.pollution_days.description.en: Configures the sliding window in game days [0-360] to average emissions. Setting this to 0 completely disables data collection and patches.
dtk.settings.pollution_days.description.context: Settings row description for pollution averaging period.
dtk.settings.pollution_days.description.de: Konfiguriert das Schiebefenster in Spieltagen [0-360] auf durchschnittliche Emissionen. Wenn Sie diesen Wert auf 0 setzen, werden die Datenerfassung und Patches vollständig deaktiviert.
dtk.settings.pollution_days.description.es: Configura la ventana deslizante en días de juego [0-360] para promediar las emisiones. Establecer esto en 0 deshabilita completamente la recopilación de datos y los parches.
dtk.settings.pollution_days.description.it: Configura la finestra scorrevole nei giorni di gioco [0-360] sulle emissioni medie. Impostandolo su 0 si disabilita completamente la raccolta dati e le patch.
dtk.settings.pollution_days.description.pt: Configura a janela deslizante em dias de jogo [0-360] para emissões médias. Definir como 0 desativa completamente a coleta de dados e patches.
dtk.settings.pollution_days.description.ru: Настраивает скользящее окно в игровых днях [0-360] для среднего уровня выбросов. Установка значения 0 полностью отключает сбор данных и исправления.
dtk.settings.pollution_days.description.sv: Konfigurerar skjutfönstret i speldagar [0-360] till genomsnittliga utsläpp. Om du ställer in detta till 0 inaktiveras datainsamling och patchar helt.
dtk.settings.pollution_days.description.zh: 将比赛日 [0-360] 中的滑动窗口配置为平均排放量。将其设置为 0 会完全禁用数据收集和修补。

dtk.settings.pollution_show_air.label.context: Settings checkbox label for showing air pollution.

dtk.settings.pollution_show_ground.label.context: Settings checkbox label for showing ground & water pollution.
dtk.settings.pollution_show_ground.label.es: Mostrar la contaminación del suelo y del agua
dtk.settings.pollution_show_ground.label.it: Mostra l'inquinamento del suolo e dell'acqua
dtk.settings.pollution_show_ground.label.pt: Mostrar poluição do solo e da água

dtk.settings.pollution_show_vehicle.labe.context: Settings checkbox label for showing vehicle & train pollution.
dtk.settings.pollution_show_vehicle.labe.de: Zeigen Sie die Verschmutzung von Fahrzeugen und Zügen an
dtk.settings.pollution_show_vehicle.labe.es: Mostrar la contaminación de vehículos y trenes
dtk.settings.pollution_show_vehicle.labe.it: Mostra l'inquinamento dei veicoli e dei treni
dtk.settings.pollution_show_vehicle.labe.pt: Mostrar poluição de veículos e trens
dtk.settings.pollution_show_vehicle.labe.ru: Показать загрязнение транспортных средств и поездов

dtk.settings.pollution_show_ship.label.context: Settings checkbox label for showing ship pollution.
dtk.settings.pollution_show_ship.label.es: Mostrar la contaminación de los barcos

dtk.settings.pollution_toggle_hotkey.lab.context: Settings row label for pollution overlay toggle hotkey.
dtk.settings.pollution_toggle_hotkey.lab.es: Tecla de acceso rápido de superposición de contaminación
dtk.settings.pollution_toggle_hotkey.lab.it: Tasto di scelta rapida in sovrapposizione sull'inquinamento
dtk.settings.pollution_toggle_hotkey.lab.pt: Tecla de atalho de sobreposição de poluição
